topics.title: Radio Show Dynamics and Rolling Stones Concert
topics.summary: The studio discusses internal staff tensions involving Scott DePace, a recent Rolling Stones concert at the Beacon Theater, and a humorous clip of J.D. hosting the intern show.

topics.title: Workplace Conflict and Production Disputes
topics.summary: The studio features a heated argument between colleagues regarding professional conduct, interpersonal dynamics, and specific production details involving graphic design and promotional materials.

topics.title: Workplace Conflict and Football Pool
topics.summary: The studio features heated arguments between staff members regarding professional conduct, production roles, and personal grievances before transitioning to a discussion about a football pool.

topics.title: Football Pool and Upcoming Guest Segment
topics.summary: The studio features a series of heated exchanges regarding football picks, promotional plugs for various products, and the introduction of an upcoming guest segment involving a person with a rare physical condition.

topics.title: Lightning Strike Incident and Studio Banter
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding a woman struck by lightning that traveled through her body and a humorous debate over physical appearance and hypothetical survival scenarios.

topics.title: Technical Issues and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio addresses technical propagation issues with a specific show, discusses celebrity news involving Courtney Love and Ann Coulter, and takes listener calls regarding industry commentary.

topics.title: Parenting Tactics and Weight Loss Discussions
topics.summary: The studio features a caller describing her use of cigarette threats to discipline children, followed by a discussion regarding Artie's weight gain, upcoming performances at Carnegie Hall, and the production of a reality show featuring DICE.

topics.title: Interview with an Intersex Individual
topics.summary: The studio hosts and guests discuss the physical characteristics and identity of a guest who identifies as a hermaphrodite.

topics.title: Interview with Jane the Hermaphrodite
topics.summary: The studio hosts interview an adult film performer who discusses her medical history, her career in the pornography industry, and her upcoming films.

topics.title: Gossip Game with Mike Walker
topics.summary: The studio hosts a segment featuring gossip columnist Mike Walker, who presents four stories—one of which is fake—involving celebrities like Paris Hilton, Justin Timberlake, and Teri Hatcher.

topics.title: Celebrity News and International Tourism
topics.summary: The show features a segment on celebrity mishaps, including Julia Roberts' tractor incident, followed by a discussion on Iran's efforts to boost tourism through incentives for Western travelers.

topics.title: Political Scandals and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio reviews various news items including a Florida legislator's resignation over racial slurs, an alleged assault involving a Nevada candidate, the divorce of Dennis Kozlowski, and Bill Belichick's son's marijuana arrest.

topics.title: Parenting, Media News, and Celebrity Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including the risks of drug use among youth, a nurse's arrest for an alleged revenge killing, parenting challenges, television content suitability for children, and updates on celebrities like Jerry Mathers, Ivanka Trump, and Russell Crowe.
